# Marketing Funnel Analysis

## Problem
Analyze ecommerce user sessions to understand drop-offs and marketing channel effectiveness.

## Dataset
Open ecommerce dataset / Kaggle user sessions data

## Tools
Python, pandas, SQL, Streamlit

## Analysis & Insights
- Conversion drops most at the “Add to Cart” step
- Paid social channels have higher CAC but better ROI
- Cohort analysis shows retention decreases after day 7

## Dashboard
[Live Streamlit Dashboard](https://share.streamlit.io/yourusername/marketing-funnel-app/main)

## GitHub
[View Code](https://github.com/yourusername/marketing-funnel-analysis)
